comments.body: Follow-up clarification: validation rerun is green (npm test 42/42). Regenerated dry-run artifact deltas are generatedAt timestamp-only with no semantic data changes. Decision remains no additional commit to avoid reviewer-noise churn; existing committed 2026-03-07 artifacts stay as canonical QA evidence.

Proactive closeout package added for reviewer and Jira alignment:

- Reviewer summary/checklist: 
- Jira alignment note: 
- Handoff checklist clarity update:  (now includes TL;DR matrix + explicit payload key mapping for backend/mobile)

Reviewer quick checks remain: contract stability (append-only), FCC-54 preview gating safety, and absent/seeded fixture behavior.

No merge action taken.

- Added consolidated Jira-ready status block for FCC-39/FCC-54/FCC-57/FCC-59: .

- Consumer ACKs from Backend/Mobile: 0 (no non-author ACK comments yet)
- Jira-ready status doc refreshed: reference/qa/fcc-39_54_57_59_jira-ready-status_2026-03-07.md

Keeping PR #13 in review lane until approvals + consumer ACKs land.

Backend/Mobile ACK request for FCC-54/FCC-59 closeout

To close ACK gates, please reply in-thread with explicit ACK for your area:

Backend ACK (requested):
- Contract mapping from rollup payload is acceptable
- Empty-state behavior is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation

Mobile ACK (requested):
- Seeded/absent-state rendering is acceptable
-  consumption is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation

If ACKing, please include any caveats/conditions in your reply so we can link evidence into Jira (FCC-54/FCC-59).

Backend/Mobile ACK request for FCC-54/FCC-59 closeout

To close ACK gates, please reply in-thread with explicit ACK for your area:

Backend ACK (requested):
- Contract mapping from rollup payload is acceptable
- Empty-state behavior is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation

Mobile ACK (requested):
- Seeded/absent-state rendering is acceptable
- `rollupAlert.shouldAlert` consumption is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation

If ACKing, please include any caveats/conditions in your reply so we can link evidence into Jira (FCC-54/FCC-59).

@sdoony action needed to close FCC-54/FCC-59 ACK gates (detailed checklist)

PR #13 is merged and approved; we now need explicit ACK evidence replies for downstream consumers.

Please provide or coordinate these two explicit ACKs in-thread:

## 1) Backend ACK (required)
Reply should explicitly confirm:
- Contract mapping from rollup payload is acceptable
- Empty-state handling is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation
- Any caveats/conditions (or “none”)

## 2) Mobile ACK (required)
Reply should explicitly confirm:
- Seeded/absent-state rendering behavior is acceptable
- `rollupAlert.shouldAlert` consumption is acceptable
- No blocker for develop continuation
- Any caveats/conditions (or “none”)

## 3) Evidence format
Please keep ACKs explicit and searchable in this thread. Example format:
- `Backend ACK: ...`
- `Mobile ACK: ...`

These two ACK comments are the last blockers for FCC-54/FCC-59 closure updates in Jira.
